questions.question: What does EMC stand for?
questions.reason: EMC means Electromagnetic Compatibility, ensuring equipment coexists without unacceptable interference.

questions.question: If your station causes interference to nearby equipment, what is a sensible first action?

options.text: Investigate your station setup and reduce the cause

questions.reason: You should investigate responsibly: check grounding, feeders, filtering, and operating conditions to reduce interference.

questions.question: Which measure can help reduce unwanted RF on cables in a home station?
questions.reason: Ferrite chokes can suppress common-mode RF currents on leads and help mitigate EMC issues.
